description: Det Chamber external analysis assets that must be pre-staged for an AIR-GAPPED build. The engine Dockerfile (deploy/Dockerfile.windows-engine) and download_tools.ps1 otherwise fetch these from the internet at build time, which fails offline. Fetch these on the online prep machine, drop them into the bundle, and point the offline build at the local copies.

yara_rules.name: reversinglabs-yara-rules
yara_rules.notes: Cloned into E:/YARA/Rules/reversinglabs; compiled by compile_yara_rules.py

yara_rules.name: elastic-protections-artifacts
yara_rules.notes: Cloned into E:/YARA/Rules/elastic; filtered to windows_x64 by filter_yara_rules.ps1

windows_tools.name: etl2pcapng
windows_tools.notes: ETL -> pcapng conversion for captured network traffic

windows_tools.name: capa
windows_tools.notes: Capability detection (also pip flare-capa in python_requirements.txt)

windows_tools.name: yara
windows_tools.notes: YARA scanner CLI used by the engine against the compiled ruleset

windows_tools.name: inetsim
windows_tools.notes: Internet services simulation for isolated dynamic detonation

licensed_manual.name: MagnetRESPONSE
licensed_manual.notes: Licensed evidence-collection tool. Operator must supply manually (not downloadable).

licensed_manual.name: procmon-config
licensed_manual.notes: Procmon filter config. Supply alongside the toolset.

linux_sandbox_packages.name: linux-analysis-toolset
linux_sandbox_packages.notes: Installed on the KVM Linux sandbox by the det_chamber_linux ansible role; stage the distro packages / pip wheels in the offline mirror.
